title: NVIDIA reveals absolutely laughable AI upscaling for your video games
author: Grant St. Clair
summary:
For a long time, I thought there was absolutely nothing one could possibly do to make Starfield worse. I really wish I hadn't been proven wrong.

In recent years, DLSS has been a net good for gamers. For the uninitiated, it's a feature available on NVIDIA graphics cards that renders games at a lower resolution before upscaling them to a higher resolution, supposedly giving the experience of playing at that high
